Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. The street in the source
is empty — populate it with the people and vehicles specified below. Remove all
modern businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, facing park, fov 90
- residential road, 1-lane, concrete
- sidewalks absent, curbs absent
- driveways: center; parking: lot
- commercial building at left, 1 story, stucco, brick, glass, metal, flat roof, shallow setback
- commercial building at center, 1 story, concrete, brick, glass, flat roof, shallow setback
- utilities: street lamp, power lines, fire hydrant
- landscape: grass strip, planter, hedge, flower bed
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 1975
Post-Vietnam, oil crisis era. A full-service neighborhood gas station in 1975 — uniformed attendants pump the gas, check the oil, and wipe the windshield.

PERIOD DETAILS
- 'FREE MAPS' and trading-stamp decals on the office window
- oil-can rack stacked with quart cans beside the pump island
- price sign showing gas around $0.57
- main sign: an independent station sign in the style of Sinclair
- window signs: 'MECHANIC ON DUTY', 'MOTOR OIL 55¢ QT'
- a bicycle leaning against a utility pole
- a 'FREE AIR' sign next to the air pump
Typography: bold sans-serif, slab serif, occasional script.
Sign text is only what appears in quotes — do not turn other words from this prompt into signage.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 5 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a mechanic in coveralls rolling a tire toward the service bay
- a mechanic leaning under the open hood of a car by the bay
- two boys with baseball gloves
Clothing: men in bell bottoms, polyester suits; women in peasant blouses, wide leg pants. No posing or eye contact. All people on sidewalks, at storefronts, or beside parked vehicles — the driving lanes stay empty of pedestrians.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 3 period vehicles, all different:
- 1971-1976 Buick LeSabre — pillarless hardtop, whitewall tires
- 1970-1976 Pontiac Firebird Trans Am — hood scoop, spoiler, bold graphics
- 1971-1976 Chevrolet G10 Sportvan — boxy windowed van, chrome bumper
Parked with gaps; no vehicle newer than 1975.
PLACEMENT: the first two parked on the LEFT side; the rest parked on the RIGHT side. No vehicle in the same spot as any other era.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, no rumble strips
- utilities: overhead power lines everywhere, wooden utility poles standard

TREES
- deciduous tree at left: very young sapling
- deciduous tree at background: very young sapling
- conifer tree at right: very young sapling
Tree sizes MUST follow this specification even where they differ from the source photo.

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
STRICTLY BLACK AND WHITE — true monochrome archival photograph, zero color anywhere.
Grain: visible fine grain. Style: documentary, natural light.
Photorealistic, like a preserved newspaper-archive frame; slight period-lens softness, not digitally sharp.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 1971-1976 Buick LeSabre — pillarless hardtop, whitewall tires
1970-1976 Pontiac Firebird Trans Am — hood scoop, spoiler, bold graphics
1971-1976 Chevrolet G10 Sportvan — boxy windowed van, chrome bumper
